ideation: This animation sequence depicts a vampire's classic pose: hands outstretched, fingers splayed slightly.  The overall effect should be one of subtle menace and elegance.  The arms will extend from the sides, palms up, to create a slightly predatory look. The movement will be slow and deliberate. Frame 1 starts with arms at the side. Frame 2 shows arms extending outward, palms up. Frame 3 shows the arms fully extended, fingers slightly splayed, but still maintaining a sleek, controlled look. Frame 4 shows a slight retraction, suggesting a pause before the next action. Frame 5 shows the arms returning to the neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
arms slowly extend outward, palms facing up
arms fully extended, fingers subtly splayed
arms retract slightly, a moment of anticipation
arms return to a resting, elegant pose
